smoke_example_homepage.prompt:
1. Call browser_start with task "Homepage smoke check".
2. Call browser_navigate to {{base_url}}.
3. Call browser_get_state to inspect the page.
4. Call assert_page_title with the expected title fragment {{expected_title}}.
5. Call assert_text_visible with the text {{expected_heading}}.
6. Call browser_stop with a summary of whether the homepage smoke check passed.
smoke_example_homepage.description: Smoke check for a homepage title and heading

smoke_example_login_form.prompt:
1. Call browser_start with task "Login form presence check".
2. Call browser_navigate to {{base_url}}/login.
3. Call browser_get_state to inspect the login page.
4. Call assert_element_exists for {{email_selector}}.
5. Call assert_element_exists for {{password_selector}}.
6. Call assert_element_enabled for {{submit_selector}}.
7. Call browser_stop with a summary of whether the login form smoke check passed.
smoke_example_login_form.description: Smoke check for login form controls

smoke_example_post_login.prompt:
1. Call browser_start with task "Post-login verification".
2. Call browser_navigate to {{base_url}}/login.
3. Call browser_fill for the email field using {{email}}.
4. Call browser_fill for the password field using {{password}}.
5. Call browser_click_by_role with role "button" and name {{submit_button_name}}.
6. Call assert_url_contains with {{post_login_path_fragment}}.
7. Call assert_text_visible with {{expected_post_login_text}}.
8. Call browser_stop with a summary of whether post-login verification passed.
smoke_example_post_login.description: Reusable login flow with post-login verification
